meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Servants of Yazma are not welcome here!
quotes.transcript: Servants of Yasma are not welcome here!

quotes.text: Atal'Dazar's power flows through me!
quotes.transcript: A TALDASAS POWER FLOWS THROUGH ME!

quotes.text: You do not belong here!
quotes.transcript: You do not belong here!

quotes.text: Corruption be purified!
quotes.transcript: Corruption be purified!

quotes.text: De pools... must be... cleansed.
quotes.transcript: The pools must be cleansed.

quotes.text: You should never have come here!
quotes.transcript: You should never have come here!

quotes.text: You came for the gold, but you will leave behind your bones!
quotes.transcript: You came for the gold, but you will leave behind your bones!

quotes.text: Death is a better fit for you.
quotes.transcript: Death is a better fit for you.

quotes.text: You have been cleansed.
quotes.transcript: You have been cleansed.

quotes.text: Only the worthy are buried here. Your corpses will feed the raptors.
quotes.transcript: Only the worthy are buried here. Your corpses will feed the raptors.

quotes.text: My claws will find your heart!
quotes.transcript: My claws will find your heart!

quotes.text: The gold answers my call.
quotes.transcript: The gold answers my call.

quotes.text: This gold is under my power.
quotes.transcript: This gold is under my power.

quotes.text: RAAAAAAAGH!
quotes.transcript: RAAAAAAAGH!

quotes.text: Beat it or I beat you!
quotes.transcript: Beat it! Or I beat you!

quotes.text: You are tiny, puny ting.
quotes.transcript: Ha ha, you are tiny puny thing!

quotes.text: I am meet with biggest brain.
quotes.transcript: I am me with biggest brain!

quotes.text: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise!
quotes.transcript: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise.

quotes.text: Your Horde gonna get smushed!
quotes.transcript: Hehehe, yeah, or gonna get smushed!

quotes.text: Zanchuli in charge. Not you.
quotes.transcript: Then truly in charge, not you!

quotes.text: I'm not so hungry now. You come back later.
quotes.transcript: I'm not so hungry now. You'll come back later.

quotes.text: HA HA! SMASHING TIME!
quotes.transcript: HA HA! SMASHING TIME!

quotes.text: The will of my mistress be done!
quotes.transcript: The will of my mistress be done!

quotes.text: Master gonna build me again!
quotes.transcript: Master gonna build me again!

quotes.text: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.
quotes.transcript: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.

quotes.text: Master, what? Your bones!
quotes.transcript: Master, what? Your bones!

quotes.text: You... I tear you apart!
quotes.transcript: You... I tear you apart!

quotes.text: You'll be in pieces!
quotes.transcript: You'll be in pieces!

quotes.text: Flesh for Master!
quotes.transcript: Flesh for Master!

quotes.text: Master take your parts. Make me stronger!
quotes.transcript: Master take your parts. Make me stronger!

quotes.text: Right! You die with me!
quotes.transcript: Right! You die with me!

quotes.text: No break total!
quotes.transcript: No break total!

quotes.text: GRRGGGGGhhh grrraghh
quotes.transcript: GRRGGGGGhhh grrraghh

quotes.text: GAH! THE POWER FATE!
quotes.transcript: GAH! THE POWER FATE!

quotes.text: Be you predator, or prey?
quotes.transcript: Be you, Precator, or pray.

quotes.text: You walk in my lands.
quotes.transcript: You walk in my lands.

quotes.text: Have you come to bargain?
quotes.transcript: Have you come to bargain?

quotes.text: What is it, child of the Horde?
quotes.transcript: What is it? Child of the Horde.

quotes.text: May you savor the flesh of your enemies.
quotes.transcript: May you savor the flesh of your enemies.

quotes.text: Never cower before the weak.
quotes.transcript: Never cower before the weak.

quotes.text: Rain wounds upon your foes.
quotes.transcript: Grand Wounds upon your foes.

quotes.text: Come, little king, let us bring ruin upon these handics.
quotes.transcript: Come, little king, let us bring ruin upon these handics.

quotes.text: You bear the mark of one of my chosen. Who are you to call upon the lower of kings?
quotes.transcript: You bear the mark of one of my chosen. Who are you to call upon the lower of kings?

quotes.text: There is blood in the waters now.
quotes.transcript: There is blood in the waters now.

quotes.text: Shakoor, Batsik, Kisak, Gashak, Bata, Kisak, Bati, Kisak, Jikak, Bato, Dina, Shatak, Satsaka, Kisak, Batsak, Bata, Kisak, Bata, Kisak, Bato, Dina, Shatak, Bato. Show me the way to heaven And show me the way to heaven Show me the way to heaven
quotes.transcript: Shakoor, Batsik, Kisak, Gashak, Bata, Kisak, Bati, Kisak, Jikak, Bato, Dina, Shatak, Satsaka, Kisak, Batsak, Bata, Kisak, Bata, Kisak, Bato, Dina, Shatak, Bato. Show me the way to heaven And show me the way to heaven Show me the way to heaven

quotes.text: Mind your tongue, traitor.
quotes.transcript: Mind your tongue, traitor.

quotes.text: Restore his spirit to his body. My priests call me back to my temple.
quotes.transcript: Restore his spirit to his body. My priests call me back to my temple.

quotes.text: Send Rastakhan to me, when he finds his teeth he gain.
quotes.transcript: Send Rastakhan to me, when he finds his teeth he gain.

quotes.text: Your council challenges your authority. Your friends try to take your life.
quotes.transcript: Your council challenges your authority. Your friends try to take your life.

quotes.text: It is time to ask yourself, are you king or are you prey?
quotes.transcript: It is time to ask yourself, are you king or are you prey?

quotes.text: You trespass upon sacred ground.
quotes.transcript: You trespass upon sacred ground.

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: You have taken what is mine. Release him.
quotes.transcript: You have taken what is mine. Release him.

quotes.text: May you savor the flesh of your enemies.
quotes.transcript: May you savor the flesh of your enemies.

quotes.text: Volgyn of the Dark Spear. Your soul is fierce. You seek justice.
quotes.transcript: Volgyn of the Dark Spear. Your soul is fierce. You seek justice.

quotes.text: Let all that I was be reborn within you.
quotes.transcript: Let all that I was be reborn within you.

quotes.text: N bleibt sub continuously
quotes.transcript: N bleibt sub continuously

quotes.text: Have you come to bargain?
quotes.transcript: Have you come to bargain?

quotes.text: The little king will rise. I am not finished with him.
quotes.transcript: The little king will rise. I am not finished with him.

quotes.text: Know your place, lower of graves, or I will put you in one.
quotes.transcript: Know your place, lower of graves, or I will put you in one.

quotes.text: Rustacan, your enemies test your borders.
quotes.transcript: Rustacan, your enemies test your borders.

quotes.text: The last glimmer of my essence is yours. Carry it to Ardenweald.
quotes.transcript: The last glimmer of my essence is yours. Carry it to Ardenweald.

quotes.text: You are the one they need.
quotes.transcript: You are the one they need.

quotes.text: I am de High Priestess of Shadra, loa of spies and poisons. And who are you?
quotes.transcript: I am the High Priestess of Shadra, lower of spies and poisons. And who are you?

quotes.text: By whose authority do you address me?
quotes.transcript: By whose authority do you address me?

quotes.text: I have no time for nonsense.
quotes.transcript: I have no time for nonsense.

quotes.text: Rabble should be seen and not heard.
quotes.transcript: rabble should be seen and not heard.

quotes.text: A rich noble in Zuldazar poke at me like dis once. ONCE.
quotes.transcript: A rich noble and sold as a poor that me like this once, once.

quotes.text: I will put your head on a spike, and den put dat spike in a box, and put dat box inside a bigger box, and den CRUSH IT WITH A HAMMER!
quotes.transcript: I will put your head on a spike and then put that spike in a box and put that box inside a bigger box and then crush it with a hammer.

quotes.text: Keep dis up, and de poison in your veins will be so potent dat even dat greedy fool Bwonsamdi will be afraid to touch ya soul!
quotes.transcript: Keep this up and the poison in your veins will be so potent that even that 3D fool one someday will be afraid to touch your soul.

quotes.text: Did I dismiss you?
quotes.transcript: Did I dismiss you?

quotes.text: Remember: I have eyes everywhere. Everywhere...
quotes.transcript: Remember, I have eyes everywhere. Everywhere.

quotes.text: Begone, and take dat foul smell wit you.
quotes.transcript: Be gone and take that foul smell with you.

quotes.text: Impressive. You made it farther than I thought, but I will still be drinking your blood.
quotes.transcript: Impressive. You made it farther than I thought, but I will still be drinking your blood.

quotes.text: Now you are under my power!
quotes.transcript: Now you are under my power!

quotes.text: Once I harness these new powers, you shall witness this empire's fall!
quotes.transcript: Once I harness these new powers, you shall witness this empire's fall!

quotes.text: Shadrach, for ages you have guided my hand. But from this day forth, I serve a new master.
quotes.transcript: Shadrach, for ages you have guided my hand. But from this day forth, I serve a new master.

quotes.text: Should we go after them?
quotes.transcript: Should we go after them?

quotes.text: Volcal, dispose of these invaders while I deal with Sadra!
quotes.transcript: Volcal, dispose of these invaders while I deal with Sadra!

quotes.text: Blood trolls are pathetic savages. They have not been a threat for ages.
quotes.transcript: Blood trolls are pathetic savages. They have not been a threat for ages.

quotes.text: The time of making bargains with Loa is over. The time of blood has come.
quotes.transcript: The time of making bargains with Loa is over. The time of blood has come.

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!

quotes.text: Zools! Zool will reap your spirit! Apart!
quotes.transcript: Zools! Zool will reap your spirit! Apart!

quotes.text: Bolt-Karl, in pieces again? No matter. I can rebuild him. But when you die, there will be no coming back.
quotes.transcript: Bolt-Karl, in pieces again? No matter. I can rebuild him. But when you die, there will be no coming back.

quotes.text: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.
quotes.transcript: I'm here. I'm here. I'm here.

quotes.text: I will tear your soul apart!
quotes.transcript: I will tear your soul apart!

quotes.text: You are too late, outsiders. The temple belongs to my master now.
quotes.transcript: You are too late, outsiders. The temple belongs to my master now.

quotes.text: Soon, Jule will awaken Dazaar. Then the Troll Empire will rise again.
quotes.transcript: Soon, Jule will awaken Dazaar. Then the Troll Empire will rise again.

quotes.text: Fool! If I had the time, I would crush you for what you did to Volkahl.
quotes.transcript: Fool! If I had the time, I would crush you for what you did to Volkahl.

quotes.text: You are too late. The blood of the lower has been spilled.
quotes.transcript: You are too late. The blood of the lower has been spilled.

quotes.text: Yes, yes, so perhaps we have a teensy bit of a problem down here. It is nothing we need to murder the king with.
quotes.transcript: Yes, yes, so perhaps we have a teensy bit of a problem down here. It is nothing we need to murder the king with.

quotes.text: This is completelyствеble
quotes.transcript: This is completelyствеble

quotes.text: Your soul is mine!
quotes.transcript: Your soul is mine!

quotes.text: Let your soul be shattered!
quotes.transcript: Let your soul be shattered!

quotes.text: Desire will awaken soon, but you will not live to see it!
quotes.transcript: Desire will awaken soon, but you will not live to see it!

quotes.text: You have made a fine sacrifice!
quotes.transcript: You have made a fine sacrifice!

quotes.text: Your blood is mine!
quotes.transcript: Your blood is mine!

quotes.text: I will put your blood to good use, now that you no longer need it.
quotes.transcript: I will put your blood to good use, now that you no longer need it.

quotes.text: My thanks for killing the priestess. You have only succeeded in strengthening my hold on the temple.
quotes.transcript: My thanks for killing the priestess. You have only succeeded in strengthening my hold on the temple.

quotes.text: Resan was a powerful lower. Perhaps you will make a worthy sacrifice for Zul.
quotes.transcript: Resan was a powerful lower. Perhaps you will make a worthy sacrifice for Zul.

quotes.text: Die, Chatra! Die forever! By the old ways I claim your power as my own!
quotes.transcript: Die, Chatra! Die forever! By the old ways I claim your power as my own!

quotes.text: Your visions had best be right about this.
quotes.transcript: Your visions had best be right about this.

quotes.text: Do not concern yourself with a few petty crimes. We have far more important matters to address.
quotes.transcript: Do not concern yourself with a few petty crimes. We have far more important matters to address.

quotes.text: Zul has but hold of this day. Rise, rise, disciples of blood. Make ready for the next age of this world.
quotes.transcript: Zul has but hold of this day. Rise, rise, disciples of blood. Make ready for the next age of this world.

quotes.text: The neutral empire is upon us. Our long stagnation is ended.
quotes.transcript: The neutral empire is upon us. Our long stagnation is ended.

quotes.text: I will inform Zool. He will decide whether it is worthy of Rastakhan's attention.
quotes.transcript: I will inform Zool. He will decide whether it is worthy of Rastakhan's attention.

quotes.text: Minions, kill them!
quotes.transcript: Minions, kill them!

quotes.text: Did I dismiss you?
quotes.transcript: Did I dismiss you?

quotes.text: I am the High Priestess of Shadra, lower of spies and poisons. And who are you?
quotes.transcript: I am the High Priestess of Shadra, lower of spies and poisons. And who are you?

quotes.text: A rich noble and sold as a poor that me like this once, once.
quotes.transcript: A rich noble and sold as a poor that me like this once, once.
